title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
author: openai-blog
raw_description: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
summary: OpenAI分析揭示SWE-Bench Pro编码基准测试存在信号与噪声问题，质疑其评估AI模型的可靠性和准确性。
analysis_note: 对基准测试的批判性分析有价值，但非技术突破，相关性高但深度一般。
